---
title: "Blog"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed:
    title: "Doria Xiao - Blog"
    description: "Psychometrics, AI, and measurement"
page-layout: full
---
